x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Campus configuration provides the location hierarchy Now Assist WSD uses for AI-powered location-aware space recommendations. Without campus structure, AI cannot filter space recommendations by employee location or proximity preferences.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_campus"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " campus records configured", finding: count + " campuses configured. Now Assist WSD has structured location hierarchy for AI-powered location-aware space recommendations." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " campus record(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " campus configured (target: 3+). Now Assist WSD AI location-based recommendations may have limited geographic coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No campus records configured", finding: "No campuses configured. Now Assist WSD cannot provide location-aware AI space recommendations without campus structure." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure campus records for each physical location in Workplace Core. Navigate to Workplace Service Delivery > Administration > Campuses to create campus records.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cc9
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Campus configuration provides the location hierarchy Now Assist WSD uses for AI-powered location-aware space recommendations. Without campus structure, AI cannot filter space recommendations by employee location or proximity preferences.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Campus Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_campus"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " campus records configured", finding: count + " campuses configured. Now Assist WSD has structured location hierarchy for AI-powered location-aware space recommendations." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " campus record(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " campus configured (target: 3+). Now Assist WSD AI location-based recommendations may have limited geographic coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No campus records configured", finding: "No campuses configured. Now Assist WSD cannot provide location-aware AI space recommendations without campus structure." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>WSD</module> <number>CHK0006227</number> <order>500</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure campus records for each physical location in Workplace Core. Navigate to Workplace Service Delivery > Administration > Campuses to create campus records.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cc9</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
